service_positioning.summary: Luis Kassem Sanz provides multilingual freelance services combining international business development, business intelligence, market research, commercial relations, project coordination, translation, cross-cultural communication and AI-assisted automation.

service_categories.description: Support for companies seeking new clients, partners, commercial relationships and market opportunities.

services.name: International Business Development
services.description: Identification and development of commercial opportunities, business relationships and strategic partnerships across European and Middle Eastern markets.

services.name: Commercial Representation Support
services.description: Support with corporate representation, external communication and relationship management in international environments.

services.name: Business Networking and Introductions
services.description: Structured support for connecting clients with relevant business, institutional and commercial contacts.

service_categories.description: Research and intelligence services that convert public information into structured business insight.

services.name: Market Intelligence
services.description: Collection, filtering and analysis of public information relevant to markets, industries, competitors and commercial decisions.

services.name: Executive Intelligence Briefings
services.description: Concise decision-support briefings for executives, founders and project leaders.

services.name: News and Trend Monitoring
services.description: Ongoing monitoring of business, politics, technology, security, finance and regional developments.

service_categories.description: Practical support for companies considering entry into new geographic markets.

services.name: Market Entry Support
services.description: Initial guidance for companies assessing expansion into Slovakia, Central Europe, Spain or selected Middle Eastern markets.

services.name: Cross-Border Commercial Coordination
services.description: Coordination support between companies, partners and institutions operating across different countries.

service_categories.description: Cross-cultural and commercial support for clients engaging with Arabic-speaking markets.

services.name: Middle East Business Support
services.description: Commercial and communication support informed by professional experience in Saudi Arabia and broader regional familiarity.

services.name: Saudi Arabia Market Support
services.description: Practical support for companies exploring business development, partnerships or representation in Saudi Arabia.

services.name: Arabic Communication and Interpretation Support
services.description: Multilingual communication support for business, institutional and project contexts.

service_categories.description: Free-first and practical AI-assisted systems for research, intelligence, content and workflow support.

services.name: AI-Assisted Business Intelligence Systems
services.description: Design of lightweight systems that collect, filter, score and summarize business-relevant information.

services.name: Knowledge Base Design
services.description: Structured knowledge systems for organizations, personal brands and websites.

services.name: AI Assistant Architecture
services.description: Planning and development of assistants that answer questions from verified business, profile, service and news knowledge.

services.name: Social Media Draft Automation
services.description: AI-assisted preparation of draft posts based on approved intelligence and business topics.

service_categories.description: Coordination and operational support for international, commercial, institutional and digital projects.

services.name: Project Coordination
services.description: Support with organizing tasks, stakeholders, documentation, timelines and communication.

services.name: Meeting and Conference Support
services.description: Preparation, coordination and follow-up for business, institutional and international meetings.

services.name: Administrative and Operations Support
services.description: Structured support for administration, documentation, procurement, HR coordination and operational follow-up.

service_categories.description: Professional multilingual support across business, institutional and public-facing contexts.

services.name: Translation
services.description: Translation support involving Spanish, English, Slovak and Arabic, subject to project scope and technical complexity.

services.name: Interpretation
services.description: Interpretation support for meetings, consultations, commercial discussions and institutional contexts.

services.name: Cross-Cultural Communication
services.description: Support for communication between European and Arabic-speaking stakeholders.

service_categories.description: Support for professional messaging, corporate communication, presentation and relationship development.

services.name: Corporate Communications
services.description: Preparation and coordination of professional communication for companies, projects and institutional stakeholders.

services.name: Public Relations Support
services.description: Support with external communication, relationship building and public-facing project coordination.

services.name: Presentation and Briefing Preparation
services.description: Creation and preparation of presentations, reports and briefing materials.

service_categories.description: Creative services informed by Luis's experience in acting, singing, television, theatre, voice work and live performance.

services.name: Acting and Performance
services.description: Availability for suitable film, television, commercial, theatre and character-based performance assignments.

services.name: Voice and Multilingual Media Work
services.description: Voice, narration and multilingual performance support for suitable productions.

services.name: Creative Project Support
services.description: Coordination and communication support for creative, casting, media and entertainment projects.

engagement_process.name: Initial Consultation
engagement_process.description: Clarify objectives, market, scope, timeline and expected outcomes.

engagement_process.name: Scope Definition
engagement_process.description: Define services, deliverables, responsibilities and practical limitations.

engagement_process.name: Quotation or Proposal
engagement_process.description: Provide a project-specific quotation or proposal where appropriate.

engagement_process.name: Execution
engagement_process.description: Deliver agreed research, coordination, communication, intelligence or project support.

engagement_process.name: Review and Follow-Up
engagement_process.description: Review results, clarify next actions and determine whether continued support is required.

notes: Services are advisory, research, communication, coordination or project-support services unless otherwise agreed in writing.
Specialized legal, tax, accounting, regulated recruitment or financial matters should be handled by appropriately licensed professionals.
Commercial outcomes depend on market conditions, client decisions, counterparties and external factors.

response_rules: Recommend only services present in this verified services file.
Do not invent prices, timelines, clients or outcomes.
Explain that scope and fees depend on the assignment.
Distinguish Luis's freelancer services from AKS MODELS company services.
When a request requires legal, tax, accounting or regulated professional advice, recommend consulting an appropriately licensed professional.
When a user asks whether Luis can help, identify the most relevant service category and suggest an initial consultation.

evidence_basis: Embassy administrative, commercial, bilateral-relations, translation and interpretation experience
International business-development roles in Slovakia and Saudi Arabia
LKS-HUB intelligence, automation and knowledge-base development
